title: Modi to raise Hormuz issue at G7 after US strike kills 3 Indian seafarers

snapshot.title: Modi to raise Hormuz issue at G7 after US strike kills 3 Indian seafarers
snapshot.description: NEW DELHI: Prime Minister Narendra Modi departed for Europe on Saturday to participate in the Group of Seven Summit, where India is expected to call for unrestricted navigation through the Strait of Hormuz following US attacks on vessels carrying Indian seafarers. Modi will be visiting France and Slovakia to meet leaders of the two countries before attending the G7 Summit in
snapshot.author: Sanjay Kumar
snapshot.pageTitle: Modi to raise Hormuz issue at G7 after US strike kills 3 Indian seafarers | Arab News
